notes: With-skill runs achieve 100% pass rate across all 3 evals vs 70% without
Button Focus QA eval passes equally in both configs — button checks are straightforward enough without skill guidance
Biggest skill impact on Full Form QA: without-skill misses Unicode validation, progress bar intro check, and accordion ARIA
Field Rendering QA: without-skill misses specific CSS value validation against spec (border weight, font-weight 700 vs 600)
Skill adds ~5.5K tokens per run but achieves perfect compliance with expected report structure
